mapper.insert: INSERT INTO training_case (trainer_id, pet_id, survey_id, status, memo) VALUES (#{trainerId}, #{petId}, #{surveyId}, #{status}, #{memo})
mapper.select: SELECT tc.*, p.name AS pet_name, p.breed AS breed, p.age AS pet_age, p.owner_name AS owner_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_log tl WHERE tl.case_id = tc.case_id) AS session_count FROM training_case tc JOIN pet p ON tc.pet_id = p.pet_id WHERE tc.trainer_id = #{trainerId} ORDER BY tc.started_at DESC

SELECT tc.*, p.name AS pet_name, p.breed AS breed, p.age AS pet_age, p.owner_name AS owner_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_log tl WHERE tl.case_id = tc.case_id) AS session_count FROM training_case tc JOIN pet p ON tc.pet_id = p.pet_id WHERE tc.case_id = #{caseId}
mapper.update: UPDATE training_case SET status = #{status}, completed_at = IF(#{status} = '완료', NOW(), completed_at) WHERE case_id = #{caseId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO training_log (case_id, session_no, goal, content, improvement) VALUES (#{caseId}, #{sessionNo}, #{goal}, #{content}, #{improvement})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM training_log WHERE case_id = #{caseId} ORDER BY session_no DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_log WHERE case_id = #{caseId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_case WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND status = '훈련 중'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_case WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND status = '완료' AND MONTH(completed_at) = MONTH(NOW()) AND YEAR(completed_at) = YEAR(NOW())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_case WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId}

SELECT tc.*, p.name AS pet_name, p.breed AS breed, p.age AS pet_age, p.owner_name AS owner_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_log tl WHERE tl.case_id = tc.case_id) AS session_count FROM training_case tc JOIN pet p ON tc.pet_id = p.pet_id WHERE tc.trainer_id = #{trainerId} ORDER BY tc.started_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
